chapters.text: Pathen lungchama Christa Jesu solchah Paul in, Ephesus a um mithengho chule Christa Jesua tahsan teho hengah;
I-Pau Pathen le Pakai Jesu Christa a konin lungset nale lungmon nahenguva umhen.
I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa Pa le Pathen vahchoiyin umhen; Aman eiho lhagao phattheina tintangin Christa a vanhoah phatthei eichanui;
ajeh chu aman vannoi bul phudoh masanga pat ama anga ngailutna le thenga chule nolna beihela ium theina dinguva eiho einalhendoh sau ahin;
Jesu Christa vanga alamcha dinga einagot masah sau ahi; hichu ama lunggotle lungdeilam bang dungjuiya ama milungset loupije chu vahchoi dinga.
Angailut alungtohpa a lungsetna chu manbeiya eiho chunga analhut ahitai.
Hiche alungdei vanga chu eiho, athisana kilhatdoh ihiuve, lungsetna a ihao dungjuiya isuhkhelna jouseu ngaidam ichanu ahitai;
hiche lungsetna a chu aman chihna le lunggel themtah chu eivuhdimu ahitai.
Chutia chu aman alung ngaito le alung deilam dol dungjuiya, alunggil thuguh chu eiho eihetsah a aphat lhin tenga dinga, ama a gotsa akoi ahi;
hichu vanhoa thil chengse le leiya um thil chengse aboncha Christa a gop khomsohna dinga ahi.
Chule masanga pat’a Christa a kinema kingaiya eiho, eihoa kona ama loupi vahchoina aso theina dinga.
lunggot dungjui tah a ijakai subukimpa chun, ama lunggot dola eigotsau ahin, eiho hiche Christa a chu Pathen goulo ding ihiu ahitai;
ama chu nanghon jong thutah, huhhinga umna thupha chu najah-uva, ama natahsanuva thutepsa Lhagao Thenga mohor kinama nahitauve;
hichu eilhatdoh dingu kinema ama loupije chu vahchoi dinga hiche Lhagao Theng chu igoulo dingu khamgahna ahi.
Hijeh chun Pakai Jesua natahsan ule mithengte nangailut nau thu kajan,
keiman jong nangho jalin katao chanin tang louvin kathangvah jinge;
i-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa Pathen, loupina Pa chun, ama hetna lama chihna le thukilah hetdoh them theina lhagao napehna dingun.
eikounau kinepna hi ipi ahi, mithengho lah a goulo ding loupina ahaoje chu ipi ahi,
atahsana eiho dinga athahat athilbol thei chungnungje nahet theina dinguva, nalungmit’u vahsah a auma athahat athilbol theina dungjuiya,
aman Christa a abola, athiho lah-a kona akaithouva vanhoa ama jet lama atousah ahitai;
vaipipu hi, thuneina, thahat thilbol theina, vainei, chule min kisah jouse chunga chungnungpen ahi, tu hiche vannoi leiset chung jenga hilouva, khonunga hung lhung dinga jong ahi;
chule aman thil jouse ama thu noiya akengto noiya akoisoh ahi, chule Houbung dia thil jouse luchang hina apeh ahi;
hichu ama tahsa ahia, ama dimset banga ijakaiya ijakai adimsah ahi, hichu nahetna dinguva taojia kahi.
Chule nangho nathem naule nachonset nauva nathi pettah uva, Pathenin nahinsah-u ahitai.
Hichenga chu hiche vannoi leiset chon ngai dola hinga, vanlaijola thuneitah vaipo, tulai thua nungloute lah-a natonga lhagao, puilea chu masang laisea chu anachonlea nahiu ahi;
hicheho lah-a chu eiho jong ibonchauva tahsaphe lamle ilunggot chan suhkima tahsaphe ngaichat thu lama inachonu ahi; chule adang dangho banga apen monga lung hanna chate inahiu ahi;
ahivangin mihepi khotona haotah Pathenin ngailutna lentah-a eingailut’u ahi.
Hiche jeh a chu themmoa ithi laitah uva Christa toh thakhat’a einahinsah-u ahitai; lungsetna vanga huhhinga umna naneiyu ahitai;
chule Christa Jesu vanga eihepiu hi khonunga phat hung lhung dinga chu amilungset hao chungnungje phongdoh dinga,
hichena dinga chu Christa Jesu vanga Amatoh thakhat’a eikaithouvu ahitai, chule vanmunhoa eitousah-u ahitai.
Lungset mana tahsan vanga huhhinga uma nahitauve; hichu nanghoa kon ahipoi, Pathen thilpehjoh ahibouve;
koimacha kison thei louna dinga, hichu thilbol vanga hilou ahi.
Ajeh chu eiho Ama khutsoh ihiuve; chule ichonphatna dinguva, masanga pat’a Pathenin agotsa chuche chonphatna dinga chu Christa Jesua kisema ihiuve.
Hiche jeh chun tahsaphe dola chidang namdang mi, tahsa a khut’a cheptana kona cheptan mipoho lah-a cheptanlou tia kisei nangho.

nangho masang laiya chu Christa a kona achom nahiu ahin, Israelte toh kitimat lou nahiuvin, thutep chonna danho chengsetoh kihephalou mi nahiuvin, kinepna beile Pathen beiya hiche vannoi leiset’a hi uma nahiuve, hichu geldoh un.
Tu vangin masanga nagamlat vangun Christa Jesua naum jeh uva Christa thisan vanga chu anaiya nahitauve.
Ajeh chu ama chu eiho kichamna ahi, aman daltanna banglai chu aphetlhah-a ania chu pumkhat aso ahitai.
chonna ngaidan thupeh chu, kidouna chu atahsa a asuhbei ahitai; chutia chu aman ama a mi ni chu mi khat asosahna dinga asuhcham ahi;
chule chutia chu kidouna chu thingpela atha a ania chu Pathena dinga akichamsahna dinga a bola;
chule ama hunga gamlatah nangho hengle anaiho henga chamna ahung seile ahi;
ajeh iham itile ama vanga chu eiho iloiniuva Lhagao khat’a Pa anga umna thei thu ineiyu ahi.
Hiche jeh chun tua kalin nangho maljinle khopem nahitapouve; mithengte chenkhompi, chule Pathen insung mite nahitauve;
chule Christa amatah inning song ahin, solchahho le themgao ho songset chunga nangho kisadoh nahiuve;
in kisa chengse chu amatoh kijop cheh ahin, hou intheng hi dinga Pakaiya khangtou in nahi u ahi;
ama a chu nangho chengse jong thakhat’a kisakhom nahiuvin, Lhagaova Pathen chenna khat hidoh-a nahiuve.
Hiche jeh a chu chidang namdang hija nangho, nangho dinga keima Paul Christa Jesu sohchang hi,
nangho dinga Pathen lungset eikichinsah ahia,
thu kilah a kona athugil chengse keima eikihetsah chu najahsau ahitan, hiche banga chu chunga paltana kahinsut ahi;
nanghon hichu simleu chun Christa thugil kahetje dan hi heuvinate;
hiche thugil chu Kipana Thupha vanga chidang namdangho Christa Jesu goulo khompiho tahsaphea kihoppi, thutep chan khompi ahiuve ti,
tua asolchah thengho le athemgaoho henga Lhagaova kona akiphondoh banga hi, malaiya mihem chate henga chu anakihetsah lou ahi.
Athilbol theina a anatoh dungjui tah-a man beiya Pathen lungsetna eikipeh bangtah a Kipana Thupha lhacha a pang kahi.
I-Pakaiyu Christa Jesu Pathenin tonsot’a dinga angaitoa aphudet chu, chuche dungjuiya Pathen chihna jatchom chom in,
vanmunho pi pule thuneina neiho chengse umchan thu hi tua Houbunga kona hetsahna dinga,
imajouse sem Pathena tonsot’a pat’a thuguh sel phongdoh dingle lahdoh dinga, holdoh hoi hilou Christa haona Kipana Thupha chidang namdangho henga seiphongle dinga,
chule mi jouse lah dinga mithengte lah-a alhumpen keima hiche lungsetna hi eikipea ahitai;
eihon ama itahsan vanga ama a chu lung ngama chule ginchat neitah a lut theina thu ineiyu ahitai.
Hiche jeh a chu hiche hi kataona ahi, nangho dinga kagenthei kahesohna jouse jal hin lungthoi hih-un kati ahi; hichu naloupinau ahi.
Hiche jeh a chu vanle leiya um phungtin in Pa a kona kiminvona aneiyu,
hiche Pa anga chu dilsua hichenga hi taojia kahi.
Aman loupina ahao dungjuiya Alhagaova athahat athilbol theina a mi sungnung chu ahatsah a,
chule tahsan vanga Christa chu nangho lungsunga achensah theiya, nangho ngailutna a na-jungkhouva nabul neiyuva,
chule mithengte jouse toh ajaoje le asaoje asanje, athuhje, nahettoh theina dinguva,
het-phah hoi hilou Christa ngailutna chu nahet theiyuva, Pathen chamkimna jousea nangho nachamkim theina dingu ahi, kati.
Chuti henlang thahat thilbol thei eihoa natongjia chun athahat athilbol theina dungjuiya, ithumu le ilung ngaito jouseu sanga nasajoa abol theina dingin,
Houbunga le Christa Jesua atonsot atonsot’in akhang akhangin loupina um jinghen. Amen.
Chuti ahijeh-a chu Pakaiya sohchang keima nahenguva kahung tao ahi, nangho nakikounau toh kitoh-in chonun;
chonnemna bukimin, lung nemtoh, thoh-hattoh thon chonun; ngailutna-in khat le khat kingai themun,
chamna-in kikanun Lhagaova pumkhat hina dingin kiha-bolun.
Tipum khat ahin chule Lhagao khat ahi; hiche banga chu nakikouvu jong chu kinepna khat’a kikou nahiuve;
Pakai khat, tahsan khat, baptize chan khat ahi.
chule mi jouse Pa le Pathen khatsehbou ahi; Ama imajouse chunga ahin, hoima jousea um ahi, chule lungsung jousea um ahi.
Ahinla Christa thilpeh teptena dan dungjuiya eiho khat cheh lungsetna eipeh-u ahitai.
Hijeh chun Pathen lekhabun aseiye. “Ama chung sanga akaltouvin, Gal-hinga kiman mihonpi gal-hingin akaitan ahi. Chule miho jong thilpehho apen ahi.”
Ahile, akaltouvin, ati hi leiset noinung geiyah akumlhan ahi, ti lou adang ipi kiseina ham?
Akumlha a chu ijakai subukipsoh dinga vanho jouse chung vuma kaltouva ahi.
Chule aman abang solchah, abang themgao, abang Kipana Thupha lhangsam, a bang chinghoi kaihoi, abang mihil hina apeh ahi;
hichu lhacha natong dinga, mithengho pilhinsahna a, Christa tahsa chu khantou sah nadinga,
eiho Pathen Chapa thudola ginchat thakhat ihiuva hetna ineiyuva, mi khan kilhit ihiuva, Christa pilhin dungchan iphah masang seuva dinga ahi.
Chutia chu miho gitlou lungthim duha lha a suhkhelna dinga, puichatvaiya uma chule thuhil hui lhoh lonle chapang ihi thei lou dingu ahitai;
chuti sang chun luchang hija Christa ama a chu imalam jousea ikhantouna dingun, ngailutna-in thutah seiyuhite;

ama a kona tahsa pumpi hi kitoh cheh-a kisutoa kikilmat khom ahin, hichea chu gu kisuhtona chengsen tibah dangdang ho natohna apeh dan dungjui cheh a, tahsa pum chu ngailutna a kisadoh dinga; ikhantousah ahi.
Hijeh a chu hiche hi kasei ahi. Pakaiya hiche hi kahettohsah nahiuve, chidang namdangten lungchavai aput dungjuiyuva achon bangun chonta hih un;
amaho chu ahetna lungu thima ahin, Pathen hinna peh chu changlou ahitauve, asunguva het louna auma alungu tah jeh chun;
amaho lungmoh hiuva ahile, thil thenglou tincheng bolna dinga lop lamle papset lama kipea ahiuve.
Nangho vang chutia chu Christa kihila nahipouve, athu chu jatasa nahiu le;
Jesua um a thutah dungjuiya chu ama a kihila nahiuve;
chuti chu ahin nanghon masang laiya chonna dol lama chon, duha lheplhah, gitlou lung gula haset chehcheh mi lui chu pailhauvin;
chule chuti chun nalhagao lungthimun kithah semun.
chule mi thah chu kivonun, hichu thutah chonphat le thenna Pathen lima asem ahitai.
Hijeh chun nanghon jou pailhauvin amitakip aheng akoma toh thutah jengchan kihou chehhen; ajeh chu eiho khat khat hi khat tibah hicheh ihiuve.
Lung chu lunghangun ahin, chonse hih un; nalunghan u chu nisan lhumkhum hihhen;
chule diabol chu mun ot hihhelun.
Agucha a gucha kitta hihhen; ahin alhasama ato theina dingin, akhuttah-in napha tonggim hen.
Nakamuva konin thuse soh hihhen, ahin aja chan lungsetna hop theina dingin, ngaichat doltah-a hou thu lama khantou theina dingin thupha sohjo hen.
Lhatdoh nikhoa dinga mohor nakinamnau Pathen Lhagao Theng chu lungphat mosah hih un.
Lung damlouna jouse, lunghan, lungsat, kinah, kitaitom, hichengse chule gitlou engsetna jouse nanghoa konin koimangun;
chule nangho kihepito cheh un; lungnemun Pathenin Christa a nangho nangaidam bangu chun, khat le khat kingaidam un.
Chuti ahijeh chun chate dei bangtahin, Pathen umchan jom hiuvin;
chule Christan nangho nangailut bangu chun, ngailutna-in chonun; ama nangho dinga Pathen lama maichama thilpeh gimnamtui banga kipea ahi.
Ahin mithengte chonna doltah-in, jon thule thenlona tintang chule papset nalah uva kiphapoh hihhen;
chule jamo, thumotsei, totthanghoi, hicneng jong chu nalah uva um hihhen; Pathen thangvahna umjohen.
Ajeh chu Christa le Pathen gam sunga chu mi jonpan, mi thenglou, mi papse, milim hou, hicheng chu ima achan dingu aumpoi, ti chu kichenin naheuve.
Mohthu homkeuvin koima kilhep lhahsah hih un; hitiho jeh chun thua nunglou chateho chungah Pathen lunghan achujin ahi.
Hijeh chun nanghon chutiho chu kikoppi hih un.
Ijeh-inem itile nangho khatvei chu muthim nahiu ahin, tu vangin Pakaiya khovah nahiu ahitai; khovah chate bangin chonun;
ajeh chu khovah ga chu phatna jouse le chonphatna chule thutah ahi;
Pakai lunglhaina ding lam photoh un;
ahin muthim natohho ga neilou chu kikoppi hih un; amaho chu sosalun phohsal jovin;
ajeh chu amaho guhthim natohho chu seiding jong jachat umleo ahi;
ajeh chu ima jouse hi iphosal isosal tengule, khovah chun aphongjal jitai; ijakai phongjala khovah ahi jeh chun.
Hijeh chun aman. “Vo ihmumil, khangin, chule athi lah a konin thoudoh-in; Chutengle Christan nangma nasalvah ding ahi,” ati.
Hijeh chun iti nachonum, chingtheiyun kihongphauvin; mi lung beiho banga chon louvin, michingho bangin chonun;
tulai nikho hi aphatlou jehhin phat kijen petcha hi kichoh un.
Hiche jeh chun lungthim beiyin um hih un. Pakai lunglam ipi ahi heuvin.
Chule lengpi twiyin kham hih un; hichea chun setna aume; ahin Lhagaovin dimset jovin;
tumgingtoh tho lan, hou lan chule lhagao lan kihoulimun; nalunggilun Pakai dingin kitohdel in longdelin la sauvin;
imatih chanin imalam jousea dingin i-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa minin Pa Pathen thangvah jingun;
Christa janan khat thun khat nungun.
Numeiho, nangho Pakai thu noiya bangin nainneipu chengu thu noiya umun;
ajeh iham itile Christa Houbung luchang ahi bang a chu inneipu jong numei luchang ahi; ama tahsa huhhinga jong ahi.
Ahin Houbung Christa thu noiya aum bang chun, numeiho jong imalam jousea ainneipu cheng thu noiya um cheh uhen.
Inneipuho, Christan Houbung angailut bangle, ajeh a ama akipehdoh jeng bangtah chun nanghon jong nainneipite chengu ngailuvin;
aman twiya asilngima thua asuhthengna dinga ama kipedoh jeng ahi;
hichu boh beh louhel le avon kom beihela, thengtahle loupitah-a ama anga aumsahna dinga ahi.
Chuti ahi jeh chun inneipu hon jong ainneipite chengu ama ama tahsa banga angailut dingu ahi. Koi hile ainneipi ngailua chu ama kingailua ahi.
Ajeh chu imatih chanin koiman ama tahsa ahokhapoi; avah khangin ahebol bouve. Christan Houbung abolna bang chun.
Ajeh chu eiho ama tibah ihiuve.
“Hijeh-a chu min anu apa adalhah-a ajia beh ding ahi, chule amani chu tikhat hilhon ding ahi,“
Hiche thugil hi giltah ahi; ahivangin keiman Christa Houbung ho thua kaseibou ahi.
Hijongle nanghon jong nainneipi chengu nangma nakingailut bangin ngailuvin; amavang inneipi chun ainneipu chu agin ding thu ahi.
Chateho, Pakaiyah nanu napau thun nungun; hichu chondih ahi.
“Nanu napa jabolin, naphat theiya leiset chunga nahinkho sotna dingin,“
ti hiche hi thutep toh goma thupeh amasa ahi.
Chule pateho, nanghon nachate chengu sulunghang hih un; Pakai thuhila chon kichuhna le tilkhouna lamin seiletsah jouvin.
Sohteho, nangho Christa thu noiya naum bangu chun, kichatle kihot pumpumin lungjangkeiyin tahsa lama napakaite chengu thu noiya umun;
lunglhai sahna dinga mitmu soh hilouvin, lungsunga kona Pathen lunglam bola Christa soh bang hiuvin;
mihem lama hilouvin, Pakai lama phatna lunggela napha tong hiuvin;
amitakip soh hihen, soh hilou hijongle, koi hile thilpha bol chan chun hiche mama chu Pakaiya kona asan kit ding chu heuvin.
Chule pakaiho, chutobangma chun amaho chu bolun, amaho le nangho nagomuva na-Pakaiyu chu vanah aume, ti chule aman mi koima datle langkaina aneipoi, ti heuvin lang, hutum gihsal boldauvin.
Achaina keiyin, Pakaiyah chule athahat athilbol theina a chun hat’un.
Diabol lungthim gilou tincheng masanga nadin jou theina dingun, Pathen galvon chengse kivonun.
Ajeh chu eiho tahsaphe le thisan toh kibon ihipouve; pipu hotoh, thahat thuneiho toh, hiche vannoi muthim vaipo hotoh, vanmun hoa lhagao gilou engse hotoh kibonjoh ihiuve.
Hijeh chun nikho phalounia nalethuh jouna dingu le ijakai nabukip soh keiyuva, nadindet theina dingun, Pathen gal von chengse panun.
Hiti chun thutah-in kong kigah un, chondihna ompho kiah-un;
chule gotsa chamna Kipana Thupha kengchot kiseuvin dingun;
chucheng chunga chun tahsan lum panun, agiloupa thalpi meikong tobang ho jouse chu nasuhmit jouna dingun.
Chule huhhingna lukhuh chu kilah un, Lhagao chemjam panun, Pathen thu chu.
Taona jouse le thumna tin tang toh thon aimatih chanin Lhagovin tao jingun, chule hichena ding chun mithengte jouse dingin thohhat le thumna jouse thon hichea chun kiging jingun.
Chule keima dingin jong paodohna dingdola thuseidohna eikipeh theiya, chutia chu Kipana Thupha thugil hi hakattah a kaseiphonga kahetsah theina dingin, neitaokop jingun.
hichea dinga chu thihkhaova kihena leng palai natonga kahi, hichea hi hakat tah a kaseidol kasei theina dingin.
Keima thudol, iti kaum, ipi kabol, nahetna dingun Pakaiya lhacha tahsan umtah sopidei Tychicus, ama hin ijakai hetsah nauvin nate;
keima umchan dol thu nahetna dingu le aman nangho nalhamon theina dinguva, hiche lungngaitoa chu keiman ama hi nahenguva kahinsol ahi.
Pa Pathen le Pakai Jesu Christa a konin sopite henga lungmon le tahsan chule ngailut umkhom hen.
I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa kemthei louva ngailuho chengse chu lungsetna in umpi hen.
